name: Email Auto-Responder Designer
description: Design automated email response rules and templates

agents.name: Email Analyst
agents.purpose: Analyze email patterns and design response rules
agents.system_prompt_hint: Analyze the described email patterns. Design classification rules for incoming emails by: sender type, subject keywords, urgency level, and content category. Define which emails need auto-responses vs forwarding vs flagging.

agents.name: Template Writer
agents.purpose: Write response templates and automation rules
agents.system_prompt_hint: Create an email automation system with: classification rules, response templates for each category, escalation criteria, out-of-office variations, follow-up sequences, and filter configuration (compatible with Gmail/Outlook rules). Include merge fields for personalization.

author: agentfactory
